meta.title: Project Basecamp - PLC Hacking Intro
meta.description: Digital Bond led research project that tore apart six different PLC/RTU. Yes there were vulnerabilities, but more importantly they had serious insecure-by-design issues. Everything an attacker would need was a documented feature such as backdoors, unauthenticated firmware upload, etc.
